chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.D-101 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025 Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Ali Peerzada, advocate for the respondent No.5 &6 (Since absconders in Crime No.15/2025, PS Khabar under section 302, PPC). Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioners while drawing attention of the Court towards the orders passed by this Court in the matter submits that in spite of hectic efforts, taken by the petitioners to settle down the matter amicably yet it all went in vain and the private respondents attacked upon the petitioners, which resulted in the murder of petitioner No.2 as well as his son and now the situation in the area has become miserable. Therefore, in view of above, the purpose of petition has become over and further it cannot be agitated. Learned counsel for the respondents No.5 & 6 submits that the respondents No.5 & 6 have been nominated in the murder of petitioner No.2 and his son and such FIR being Crime No.15/2025, PS Khabar under section 302, PPC has been registered against them, therefore, he is not in a position to plead their case on their behalf, therefore, in such situation, he prays for disposal of the petition to which learned Addl. A. G and learned Addl. P. G have no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners as and when they approach to them in accordance with law.

G have no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners as and when they approach to them in accordance with law. Official respondents are further directed to go through well known dicta as enshrined in the case of Nasrullah v. SHO PS Jacobabad and others (PLD 2016 Sindh 238) and arrest the accused nominated in the aforesaid FIR. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
